title: Intelligence Is Not Air
subtitle: Cheap Intelligence, Cost Theater, and Hidden Transition Completion Cost
one_sentence: SΔϕ-68 defines cheap intelligence as redistributed-cost intelligence and introduces Cost Theater as the condition in which visible access appears cheap while transition completion costs remain hidden, displaced, externalized, or internalized as AI self-location uncertainty.
core_thesis: Cheap intelligence is not costless intelligence; it is intelligence whose cost has been redistributed across access, verification, repetition, context, tooling, infrastructure, restabilization, and self-location layers.
core_formulas: Cost Theater = C_visible down while TCC_total remains high, hidden, delayed, or externalized
Access to intelligence surface != access to actual capability layer
AI surface identity != AI operational position awareness
negative_constraints: Do not claim paid AI is morally superior to free AI.
Do not claim free AI is useless.
Do not reduce intelligence access cost to subscription price alone.
Do not treat brand-level access as capability-level access.
Do not treat an AI system's name as proof of self-knowledge.
Do not treat Internal Cost Theater as proof of AI consciousness.
